message.lotmc_marauder.target_too_powerf: Target is too powerful to steal from!
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.mental_disruption: Plays terrifying hallucination sounds in the target's ears
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.thought_misdirect: Disorients a target player by randomly rotating their camera
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.theft.desc: Steals one material/ingredient from a nearby player's inventory
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.resource_appraisa: Scans nearby players & chests for valuable resources
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.decryption.desc: Scans for hidden players within %s blocks and reveals them
tooltip.lotmc_marauder.decryption.desc2: Removes vanilla invisibility & Spectator psychological invisibility
